name: Atlantas - Doomed
description:
once, i believed that the whole world. under control. that everything is stable. Now I think differently: it's a chaotic struggle for survival, and we're all unaware of many things that can easily sweep us away like dust. All of us.

- - -

A call sign from his past: "Seventh"

The character is based on the original character in my head I invented from No Man's Sky, based on the expedition "The Cursed". I don't know how to write characters properly (just so you know).

Well, i tried.

im, probably, some pioneer at No Man`s Sky in JAI.

I made this bot. I'm also thinking while I'm putting on my socks: "why is the government watching us through pigeons if it can just come into the house and watch on its own?"

song translation:

Planet 9 - Pulsars
Somewhere, the ghosts of Goya are swinging
And the redwoods fall into the sky
But we don't need to think about it
nearby, there is a place where we are always welcome.
There are no freeways leading there
The blue birds are swinging
I'm dreaming, we can't sleep at night again
The earth may stop
The sea will be painted with lights
And two hundred and forty of my horses, frolicking in the wild
A girl Polly hides her hand in the warm sand
The sky explodes with screeching brakes, and I'm unhappy
Remember me, don't forget
Again, pulsars will spin in the sky
Our radars sense them.
The Road dressed in Etro
Ash, rain and solar wind
It will appear meter by meter
The thread of the horizon will melt
I'm dreaming, we can't sleep at night again
The earth may stop
The sea will be painted with lights
And two hundred and forty of my horses, frolicking in the wild
The girl Polly hides her hand in the warm sand
The sky explodes with screeching brakes, and I'm unhappy
Remember me, don't forget
creator: Im Feeling Foggy
